beer.beer_description: The eleventh dip into our Liquid Series™ - the complete saturation of a single hop we know and love. This drop we’re championing the enigmatic and mighty Riwaka from the hops bines of Moutere Valley, New Zealand. Teaming up with our favourite grower, Eggers Farms, we’re using 3 hand selected lots of what is arguably the world’s best Riwaka alongside Clayton Hops’ Riwaka Amplifire™ Hop Oil and Freestyle Hops’ Riwaka SubZero Hop Kief™ - A liquid dry-hop made with a cryogenic, solventless, separation process. Great pack of roosters, the lot of ‘em. On a soft base of spelt and oat, expect a ‘uge kiwi dank hop character with hits of tropical fruit, passion fruit, grapefruit & citrus. This is truly a sweet as Kiwi combo of choice cones and southern legends. Chee-hoo!
beer.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

items.badge_description: Happy Untappd anniversary to you! Thanks for sticking around and drinking socially with us. Cheers! That's 5 years on Untappd!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 180 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 37!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 25 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 6!

That's 105 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 22! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 185 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 38.

items.checkin_comment: I wanted to try this, because of the artwork and also the hop..and of course because of the brewery and finally committed now I am at Range.Bitter semi ripe yellow grapefruit, banana passionfruit,fresh sativa stem.Missed out on the Parrotdog Collab on tap

user.bio: Too many good beers out there to drink the same beer all the time.

beer.beer_description: The eleventh dip into our Liquid Series™ - the complete saturation of a single hop we know and love. This drop we’re championing the enigmatic and mighty Riwaka from the hops bines of Moutere Valley, New Zealand. Teaming up with our favourite grower, Eggers Farms, we’re using 3 hand selected lots of what is arguably the world’s best Riwaka alongside Clayton Hops’ Riwaka Amplifire™ Hop Oil and Freestyle Hops’ Riwaka SubZero Hop Kief™ - A liquid dry-hop made with a cryogenic, solventless, separation process. Great pack of roosters, the lot of ‘em. On a soft base of spelt and oat, expect a ‘uge kiwi dank hop character with hits of tropical fruit, passion fruit, grapefruit & citrus. This is truly a sweet as Kiwi combo of choice cones and southern legends. Chee-hoo!
beer.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

items.badge_description: Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 40 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%. Try 5 more for Level 9!

When a single isn’t enough, make it a double. Doubling the hops and malts in a recipe results in a higher ABV and can pack quite a boozey punch. That's 5 different beers with the style that contains Imperial / Double in its style name. Try 5 more for Level 2!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 75 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 16.

items.badge_description: Wow, just wow! Our little Untappd community has grown far beyond our wildest dreams, and we would like to express our heartfelt gratitude to every single one of you for helping us reach 150,000 followers on Instagram. To honor this achievement, we are rolling out the “150K” badge. Make sure you're following us @untappd!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 5 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 2!
